Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Noroloth]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Noroloth was a Herald grandson of Natarianath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Noroloth is a black dragon and the son of the emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Noroloth is a Remnant whose spirit is imprisoned within a script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Noroloth is a black dragon prince.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Noroloth is a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Noroloth's spirit can be hauled out bodily if Lindon tears open space.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Noroloth is the Remnant of an ancient black dragon Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Noroloth is a black dragon prince spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Noroloth's tail dissolves to smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Noroloth is a Herald dragon Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Noroloth is a black dragon Remnant and one of the Twin Guardians of the Twin Star Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Noroloth is roughly the level of an Overlord.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
